title: DatasheetsManifest
description: Shape of datasheets/manifest.json. Tracks BOTH the legacy 'extractions' cache index (v1.3 compatible) AND the new 'pdfs' SHA-dedup section (v1.4 Tier 1). Consumers tolerate additional keys (additionalProperties: true).

version.description: Manifest schema version. v1.3 used integer (EXTRACTION_VERSION); v1.4 emits string '1.0'. Readers accept both.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent write.

pdfs.description: Tier 1 PDF SHA dedup (v1.4+). Keyed by 'sha256:<hex>'. Multiple MPNs may point at the same PDF when datasheets are catalog-style (e.g. Yageo 0603 resistors).

mpns.description: All MPNs represented by this PDF. Grows as new parts from the same family are pulled.

source_url.description: Origin URL the PDF was downloaded from (e.g. a manufacturer product page or direct datasheet URL). null for offline or locally-sourced PDFs.

is_family.description: True when scout flags this as a catalog-style datasheet. Reserved for v1.5 Tier 2 family extraction; always null in v1.4.

extractions.description: Legacy v1.3 cache index. Retained for backward compatibility — the v1.3->v1.4 consumer API wrappers read this section. New writes prefer the per-MPN <MPN>.json files referenced via the 'pdfs' section.
